name: upp-umk
description: Build, run, and manage Ultimate++ (U++) assemblies and packages via the umk command-line tool

upp.varDir.description: Directory containing U++ .var assembly files. Defaults to ~/.config/u++/theide/ (modern) or ~/.upp/theide/ (legacy).

upp.workspacesDir.description: Directory containing .code-workspace files. When an assembly is selected, the extension looks for a matching <assemblyName>.code-workspace here, then falls back to any workspace whose folders overlap the assembly nests, then to opening the first nest dir directly.

upp.umkPath.description: Path to the umk executable. Defaults to 'umk' (must be on $PATH).

upp.buildMethod.description: Build method name (e.g. GCC, CLANG) searched in ~/.config/u++/theide/, or a direct path to a .bm file. umk defaults to CLANG and auto-creates GCC and CLANG on POSIX if they don't exist.

upp.buildFlags.description: Combined build flags without the leading dash (e.g. 'r' for release, 'br' for blitz+release, 'v' for verbose). Default is debug mode with full debug info. The 's' and 'S' flags are controlled by upp.linkMode — do not include them here.

upp.linkMode.description: Library linking mode. 'all-static' = link everything statically. 'use-shared' = use shared libraries (-s). 'all-shared' = use shared and build as shared (-S).

upp.configurationFlag.description: Compilation +FLAGs passed to umk (e.g. 'GUI,MT'). Passed as +FLAG,FLAG.

upp.cppStandard.description: Override the C++ standard for IntelliSense (e.g. 'c++17', 'c++20'). Leave empty to use the platform default.

upp.guiMode.description: GUI vs console mode. 'auto' derives from the .upp mainconfig, 'gui' always passes +GUI, 'console' omits it.

upp.runArgs.description: Extra arguments appended after the executable when running (e.g. '--log-level=debug').

upp.runCwd.description: Working directory for the run process. Leave empty to use the workspace root.

upp.runEnv.description: Environment variables for the run process, one per line in KEY=VALUE format.

upp.terminalApp.description: Terminal emulator to run programs in. Leave empty to auto-detect from $TERMINAL, $TERM_PROGRAM, VTE (gnome-terminal), XDG settings, or fall back to xterm.

upp.outPath.description: Override output file or directory. Passed as the 'out' argument to umk.

upp.activeAssembly.description: Path to the active .var assembly file (set via UPP: Select Active Assembly).

upp.activeMainPackage.description: Main package within the active assembly (set via UPP: Select Active Assembly).

upp.buildCommand.markdownDescription:
The full UMK build command. Auto-generated when you select an assembly/package — edit freely to override. Example:
```
umk myapp MyApp/Main GCC -br +GUI,MT
```

upp.debugCommand.markdownDescription:
The full UMK debug build command. Auto-generated from buildCommand with release flag removed. Used by the Debug action.
```
umk myapp MyApp/Main GCC -bsH8 +GUI,X11
```

upp.releaseCommand.markdownDescription:
The full UMK release build command. Auto-generated from buildCommand with release flag added. Used for release builds.
```
umk myapp MyApp/Main GCC -brsH8 +GUI,X11
```

upp.showWorkspaceSwitchNotification.description: Show a 'Switch / Stay' prompt when a new .code-workspace is created or a different one is selected. When disabled, the workspace switches automatically.

upp.autoMoveWorkspaces.description: Automatically move .code-workspace files when their assembly directories change location. If false, prompts the user to choose Update/Move/Delete/Ignore for each mismatch.

upp.outputConsole.description: When to open the terminal during run. 'always' opens it immediately, 'auto' opens only on failure, 'never' leaves it closed.

upp.compileCommandsMode.description: compile_commands.json generation mode. 'auto' watches source files and regenerates on changes, 'manual' provides a command to generate on demand, 'off' disables. Workspace setting overrides user setting.

upp.generateClangJson.markdownDescription:
The full UMK command for compile_commands.json generation. Auto-generated when you select an assembly/package — edit freely to override. Example:
```
umk myapp MyApp/Main CLANG -j
```

upp.outputDir.description: U++ build output directory. Defaults to ~/.cache/upp.out/ or ~/upp.out/ depending on your U++ version. Used to locate the compiled binary for debugging.

upp.debuggerPath.description: Path to gdb executable for debug sessions. Used by Native Debug (webfreak.debug) or cpptools extensions.

upp.restartClangdAfterGenerate.description: Automatically restart the clangd language server after generating compile_commands.json. Ensures clangd picks up the new data immediately.

assembly.description: Assembly name or comma-separated nest dirs

mainPackage.description: Main package to build, e.g. MyApp/Main
